title: vulpia grayi
intro: Vulpia grayi, also known as Gray's Fescue or Vulpia, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, helping to reduce inflammation and promote mucus clearance in the lungs. The health benefits of Vulpia grayi are also attributed to its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
